level_signals: Comp range $105,400–$155,000 base, consistent with mid-senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Bachelor's degree and 5+ years of experience in finance/management consulting, business operations, business analytics, or high-growth/early-stage startup or entrepreneurial experience is a big plus
Bachelor's degree and 5+ years of experience in finance/management consulting, business operations, business analytics, or high-growth/early-stage startup or entrepreneurial experience is a big plus
Your expert communication and interpersonal skills set you apart. You are comfortable at connecting with customers and internal teams to promote products and drive adoption
You are a strong analytical thinker who can provide applicable recommendations out of complex fast changing environments that are often 0-1 bets.
You crave responsibility and want to shape the vision and direction of the company
You have experience leveraging AI in your day to day tasks to accelerate your ability to move quickly and test hypotheses.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: high-growth/early-stage startup or entrepreneurial experience is a big plus

scope.surface: DoorDash Commerce Platform — ecommerce fulfillment for restaurants, grocers, and retailers (first-party experiences)
primary_metrics_inferred: Growth and adoption of Commerce Platform offerings
Product market fit signals from enterprise merchants
core_responsibilities: Drive growth and adoption of top priority projects
Develop and foster deep relationships with top priority merchant partners
Build go-to-market strategy based on product market fit, value proposition, pricing, and competitive landscape
Guide operational improvements for merchant partners by understanding their needs and working with internal partners
Steer the Commerce Platform product roadmap informed by quantitative analysis and qualitative merchant feedback
Lead cross-functional workstreams across Product, Engineering, Finance, Analytics, Support, Sales and Account Management
Evaluate and test various revenue, cost and quality drivers
Design experiments that improve quality and operations

Direct ownership of strategic segment with executive visibility
